title: String signal classifier
purpose: Reduce string list noise by classifying strings into evidence categories and highlighting strings that should drive investigation.
actions: Classify URLs, paths, registry keys, commands, credentials, format strings, UI text, debug strings, and low-value noise
Expose string signal metadata in Inspector
Feed high-value string classes into Function Radar scoring

criteria: Existing sensitive_string radar reasons still pass
Classifier returns at most one primary class and optional tags
Low-value strings do not raise risk by themselves
Tests cover credential, path, URL, UI, and noise cases
